detail.description:
Demons have torn through the world’s barrier, unleashing an endless tide of despair.
The legendary Magic Cube has surfaced once again—a divine artifact holding infinite power, the final glimmer of hope against the abyss!
Now, the call of fate crosses oceans! Are you ready to become the long-awaited hero this world craves? Restore peace to a realm plunged into despair by demonic invasion, and embark on a legendary journey to rewrite destiny!

——Game Features——

▶ Next-Gen Combat Visuals, A Feast
